message:
feat(index,fusion,fsfs): batch indexing pipeline, vector skip diagnostics, and WAL stale-detection fix

frankensearch-fsfs/runtime.rs:
- Restructure indexing workflow into clear phases (init → batch → commit → finish)
- Implement batch processing with BATCH_SIZE=512 for vectorized operations
- Move embedder initialization and probing upfront for early failure detection
- Per-batch embedding failure handling (warn + continue) instead of crashing

frankensearch-fusion/searcher.rs:
- Differentiate skip reasons: "no_fast_phase_candidates" when initial hits
  are empty vs "vector_index_unavailable" when hits exist but vector phase
  is skipped, improving diagnostic telemetry

frankensearch-index/lib.rs:
- Fix stale WAL detection for legacy files (generation 0): Main=0+WAL=0
  is valid pre-upgrade state, Main>0+WAL=0 is stale (compaction crash)
- Move repro_duplicate_entries_on_compaction_crash regression test from
  repro_bug.rs into lib.rs to co-locate with production code

frankensearch-index/repro_bug.rs:
- Replace with deprecation notice (test moved to lib.rs)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
